overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game, showing a character in a spacesuit walking through an industrial locker room and workshop interior. The environment features warm artificial lighting, metal surfaces, and atmospheric haze as the character passes an NPC and exits through a doorway into an adjacent compartment.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial locker room entrance with caution signage

events.description: NPC woman passes close to camera temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the lockers area through the corridor

notable_agents.action: woman in work uniform walking past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: doorway with illuminated red LOCKERS sign above
yellow wet floor caution sign with red triangle symbol
grey container with white recycling symbol

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an industrial locker room with a yellow caution sign visible on the right. An NPC woman in a red and black uniform passes close by the camera. The environment features metal stairs on the left and a doorway marked LOCKERS ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial workshop with workbenches and storage

agents.ego_description: moving through the workshop area past workbenches and equipment

entered.detail: long metal workbench with various items and tools
stack of cardboard boxes on the workbench surface
large black ventilation fan mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: Moving past the lockers area, the character enters a workshop space with a long workbench on the right holding cardboard boxes. An industrial fan is mounted on the wall, and the recycling bin remains visible on the left. The space has a hazy, warm-lit atmosphere typical of a utilitarian workspace.

events.description: character walks through doorway into the adjacent lit room

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking through the doorway into the next room

entered.detail: open doorway leading to a brightly lit adjacent room
industrial light fixture hanging from ceiling above doorway

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an open doorway leading to an adjacent room, passing under a hanging light fixture. The workbench and equipment from the previous area fall behind as the character moves toward the exit. The transition leads into a brighter adjacent space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a utilitarian industrial interior that transitions from a locker room into a hazy workshop and finally toward a brighter adjacent compartment. It begins by following a character through a locker room past metal stairs and a yellow caution sign, as an NPC woman in a red and black uniform passes close by. As the camera moves past the locker area, the scene opens into a warm-lit workshop featuring a long workbench topped with cardboard boxes and an industrial fan mounted on the wall. The perspective then shifts forward, passing under a hanging light fixture while the equipment and recycling bins recede into the atmospheric haze. Finally, the camera glides through an open doorway, leaving the workshop behind to enter a more brightly lit neighboring space.
